data.title: NEAR Protocol to Host Meetup in Denver  on February 18
data.description:
NEAR Protocol announces Intents Day at ETHDenver, scheduled for February 18 from 19:00 UTC. The event will feature speakers from multiple ecosystems discussing ongoing development and practical implementation of intent-based architecture.

Refer to the official tweet by NEAR:

NEAR Protocol
@NEARProtocol

Intents Day @ ETHDenver is less than a week away!

Join us in person or online, as a stacked lineup of speakers from various ecosystems discuss how they are actively building with Intents.

🗓ï¸ Feb 18 | 12:00â€“5:30 PM MST pic.twitter.com/RFH7xmg5Of

Feb 12, 2026

NEAR Info

NEAR Protocol is a decentralized platform for application development. The platform was created to facilitate the development and usage of decentralized applications (dApps) and is built on blockchain technology.

NEAR Protocol utilizes sharding technology, which enables the network to process large volumes of transactions without compromising speed. This technology makes Near an ideal solution for building blockchain applications that can handle a significant number of users and complex operations.

One of the key features of NEAR Protocol is its focus on making blockchain interaction more user-friendly and accessible for both regular users and developers. The platform allows developers to create applications that look and behave similar to traditional web applications, with the same level of security and transparency provided by blockchain technology.

The NEAR token (NEAR) serves as the primary unit of digital asset on the platform. NEAR tokens are used for transaction payments, staking, voting, and other operations within the NEAR network.

data.title: Coronado to Idle U.S. Coal Complex Without Profitable Offtake Arrangements
data.description:
(21:21 GMT) *Coronado Global Resources: Mammoth Underground Was Permitted to Restart From Feb. 11
(21:22 GMT) *Coronado: Full Production Expected To Be Restored Within Coming Weeks
(21:22 GMT) *Coronado: Australian Open‑Cut Operations Have Stabilized Following Tropical Cyclone Koji
(21:23 GMT) *Coronado: Expects No Material Production Impact From Tropical Cyclone Koji
(21:24 GMT) *Coronado: Queensland Financial Provisioning Scheme Manager Has Finalized Annual Review
(21:24 GMT) *Coronado: No Surety Required For Estimated Rehabilitation Cost; Only Pool Contribution As Planned
(21:25 GMT) *Coronado: Logan Operation Running At a Loss Amid Sustained Weakness in U.S. High-Vol Coal Market
(21:25 GMT) *Coronado: Immediately Curtailing Logan Production to Cover Contractual Commitments
(21:26 GMT) *Coronado: Contractual Commitments Expected To Be Fulfilled by March
(21:26 GMT) *Coronado: Will Idle Logan if Further Profitable Offtake Arrangements Can't Be Secured By March
(22:12 GMT) Coronado to Idle U.S. Coal Complex Without Profitable Offtake Arrangements

By Rhiannon Hoyle

Coronado Global Resources said that its Logan coal-mining operation in the U.S. is operating at a loss and will need to be idled if the company can't secure profitable offtake arrangements.

Australia-based Coronado on Monday said it is "taking steps to preserve liquidity and protect shareholder value" as prices for the coal it mines at the Logan Complex in West Virginia trade below its cash operating cost there.

Coronado said it expects to fulfill contract commitments by March.

"If further profitable offtake cannot be secured by that time, the Logan Complex will be temporarily idled to minimize cash consumption while maintaining optionality should market conditions improve," the company said.

Write to Rhiannon Hoyle at rhiannon.hoyle@wsj.com

data.title: Australian gold miner Genesis Minerals to buy Magnetic Resources for $452 million
data.description:
Australian gold miner Genesis Minerals said on Monday it will buy Magnetic Resources , a mid-tier gold developer, for an implied equity value of about A$639 million ($451.65 million).

Under the deal, Magnetic shareholders will receive A$1.40 cash and 0.0873 new fully paid ordinary share in Genesis per Magnetic share, implying an offer price of A$2.00. That represents a 25% premium to Magnetic's last closing price.

The board of Magnetic Resources has unanimously recommended that its shareholders vote in favour of the acquisition.

If the deal goes through, Genesis will acquire Magnetic's flagship Lady Julie Gold Project, which had an estimated combined mineral resource of 2.24 million ounces as of January 2026.

"Exchanging Magnetic shares for Genesis shares will enable Magnetic shareholders to retain exposure to Lady Julie with the benefit of Genesis' ... diversified operating cash flow and robust balance sheet," Magnetic Managing Director George Sakalidis said.

($1 = 1.4148 Australian dollars)

data.title: Injective to Host Meetup in Denver on February 19
data.description:
Injective has announced a developer-focused event at ETHDenver centered on its RWA developer suite. The session will highlight tooling designed to help teams build institutional-grade decentralized applications and tokenized assets. The event will take place on February 19.

Refer to the official tweet by INJ:

Injective 🥷
@injective

Next Week at ETH Denver, come chill with us.

Moderated by @jacqmelinek, learn how Injective's RWA developer suite, with functionality provided by @moonpay and @Chainlink, enable developers to build institutional-grade dApps and assets in record time.

RSVP below 👇ï¸ pic.twitter.com/3oPGyV8vIr

Feb 12, 2026

INJ Info

Injective Protocol is a decentralized exchange (DEX) protocol built on the Cosmos SDK, offering advanced cross-chain trading capabilities.

Key features of Injective Protocol include:

1. Decentralization: On the Injective platform, users have full control over their funds, with no third-party intervention.

2. Cross-chain trading: Injective supports trading between different blockchains, providing users with a wide range of tradable assets.

3. High performance: Injective utilizes the Tendermint consensus system, ensuring high throughput and low transaction latency.

4. Gas-free transactions: Users can trade without the need to pay gas fees.

INJ is the native token of Injective Protocol. The token is used for protocol governance, staking, and participation in voting processes that address key protocol upgrades and management decisions.

data.title: Australian takeover target BlueScope beats estimate with first-half earnings
data.description:
Australian takeover target BlueScope on Monday reported a more than two-fold jump in its first-half earnings and beat estimates due to stronger U.S. spreads, higher volumes across key markets, and solid cost performance.

The steelmaker, which rejected a A$13.2 billion ($9.32 billion) buyout bid from SGH and U.S.-based Steel Dynamics , posted underlying net profit after tax of A$382 million, topping a Visible Alpha estimate of A$349.2 million.

This compared to A$176.4 million reported last year.

The company declared an interim dividend of 65 Australian cents per share, compared to 30 AU cents announced last year.

($1 = 1.4144 Australian dollars)

Statutory profit after tax rose 6.4% year-over-year to $230.6 million, with cash earnings at $256.4 million, up 2.8% sequentially but down 3.3% year-over-year. The bank faces regulatory scrutiny over AML/CTF deficiencies and is investing in technology and risk management while maintaining strong capital and liquidity ratios.

Original document: Bendigo & Adelaide Bank Ltd. [BEN] Interim report — Feb. 15 2026

data.title: LCX - PayAgent - 16 Feb 2026
data.description:
According to the LCX team’s announcement, PayAgent is launching as a non-custodial payment link service that lets humans and AI agents create simple payment URLs, receive crypto, and earn LCX with flat fees and no signup. Mechanically, this adds a lightweight commerce and remittance front-end on top of LCX’s existing infrastructure, which can increase on-chain transactions and tie user activity to LCX-denominated incentives. For price, the key driver will be whether PayAgent achieves recurring usage; in the near term, launch news can amplify speculation around an “AI + payments” narrative and increase volatility around go-live.

LCX
@lcx

PayAgent by @LCX launches tomorrow.

Crypto payments for humans and AI agents.

Create a link. Get paid. Earn LCX. Non-custodial. Flat fees. No signup. https://t.co/E8CFBFC6qF pic.twitter.com/wiKpqnrDE8

Feb 15, 2026

data.title: Apro - 42 - 15 Feb 2026
data.description:
In its partnership announcement, APRO confirms it is now the oracle data partner for 42, which aims to build “consensus capital markets” using multi-source data feeds, faster settlement, and verifiable infrastructure. Mechanistically, this means 42’s markets will rely on APRO for authoritative, real-time data, potentially increasing oracle queries and revenue opportunities if 42 attracts liquidity and trading volume. For price, oracle integrations are often treated as validation events that can re-rate a token’s perceived relevance. Near term, traders may speculate on APRO’s role in a new asset-class narrative before concrete usage and fee data are visible.

APRO |NO.1 Oracle
@APRO_Oracle

As 42’s oracle partner, APRO now powers:

Multi-source, authoritative data feeds

Faster, more reliable settlement — turning live moments into tradable markets instantly

Verifiable infrastructure that users can trust without compromise

Together, we're building more…

Feb 15, 2026

data.title: AINFT - Bank of AI - 15 Feb 2026
data.description:
AINFT’s Bank of AI, described in the project’s launch post, is a financial layer for AI agents offering on-chain payments, identity, and DeFi functions, initially on TRON and BNB Chain, with x402 standard support and drop-in OpenClaw integration. Mechanistically, this positions AINFT as core infrastructure for autonomous agents that need programmable wallets and asset management. If Bank of AI secures real transaction volume, TVL, and integrations, any fee, governance, or utility link to the AINFT token could support repricing. In the short term, traders may front-run adoption expectations as TRON’s AI-focused ecosystem narrative develops.

AINFT
@OfficialAINFT

AINFT introduces Bank of AI

A financial layer built for AI agents

On-chain payments, identities, and DeFi

Starting with TRON & BNB Chain — expanding to all chains

Complete x402 Standard Support

On-chain identity, built on the 8004 standard

On-chain Asset Management…

Feb 15, 2026
